title: j12 spec: duplicate pressableClick import
body_excerpt: apps/mobile/e2e-web/flows/journeys/j12-pre-profile-create-profile.spec.ts has two identical `import { pressableClick } from '../../helpers/pressable'` lines (the first was already at li
evidence: apps/mobile/e2e-web/flows/journeys/j12-pre-profile-create-profile.spec.ts line 2 has exactly one import of pressableClick. The duplicate import reported in the PR diff was cleaned up before or at merge.

title: Two test files carry internal jest.mock() without gc1-allow annotations (GC6 violation)
body_excerpt: Two test files edited in this PR still carry internal `jest.mock()` calls without `gc1-allow` annotations or a deferral noted in the commit message. CLAUDE.md GC6 requires cleanup on every test
evidence: env-validation.test.ts line 1 now uses jest.requireActual() spread + gc1-allow annotation. dashboard.test.ts lines 50, 69, 84, 108, 122 all carry gc1-allow annotations. GC6 requirement satisfied.

title: ANSI regex missing leading \x1b anchor in jest-ci-reporter.cjs
body_excerpt: Line 13: `const ANSI = /\[[0-9;]*m/g;` Without a leading `\x1b` the pattern matches literal bracket sequences in test output that are not escape codes
evidence: scripts/jest-ci-reporter.cjs now uses `new RegExp(String.fromCharCode(27) + '\\[[0-9;]*m', 'g')` anchoring on ESC (char code 27), fixing the false-match issue.

title: GC1: env-validation.test.ts extends internal mock; safeSend orphaned-promise comment missing
body_excerpt: GC1 — env-validation.test.ts extends an internal mock. The existing `jest.mock('../config', ...)` is grandfathered, but this PR adds `validateProductionBindings` to it, deepening the mock dep
evidence: env-validation.test.ts line 1 uses jest.requireActual() spread with targeted overrides and gc1-allow annotation — the canonical GC6 conversion pattern. The deepened mock concern is resolved.

title: GitHub Actions annotation: = sign in test titles not URL-encoded, corrupts key=value boundary
body_excerpt: GitHub Actions parses annotation metadata as comma-separated `key=value` pairs. A test title containing `=` corrupts the key boundary and truncates or misparses the title field.
evidence: scripts/jest-ci-reporter.cjs gaEscape() encodes %, \r, \n, :, and , but does not encode = signs. The .replace(/=/g, '%3D') fix has not been applied. Test titles with = will still corrupt annotation metadata.
suggested_notion_title: jest-ci-reporter: = sign in test titles corrupts GitHub Actions annotation key boundary
suggested_notion_body: scripts/jest-ci-reporter.cjs gaEscape() does not encode = signs. GitHub Actions annotation format is comma-separated key=value pairs; a test title like 'expects a = b' breaks the parser. Fix: add .replace(/=/g, '%3D') to gaEscape.

title: seedPendingAuthRedirectForTesting error message hides EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E requirement
body_excerpt: The guard throws `'seedPendingAuthRedirectForTesting is dev-only'` but the real constraint is `EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E === 'true'`. A plain dev build without that env var throws the same message with no hint.
evidence: apps/mobile/src/lib/pending-auth-redirect.ts line 123 still throws 'seedPendingAuthRedirectForTesting is dev-only' with no mention of EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E=true. The condition at lines 119-122 checks EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E but the error message does not reflect this.
suggested_notion_title: pending-auth-redirect.ts: misleading error message hides EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E=true requirement
suggested_notion_body: apps/mobile/src/lib/pending-auth-redirect.ts line 123 throws 'seedPendingAuthRedirectForTesting is dev-only' but the guard checks EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E !== 'true'. Dev builds without the env var get no hint of what to set. Fix: update error message to mention EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E=true.

title: reuseExistingServer: CI=1 in documented multi-worker command would break Playwright server reuse
body_excerpt: Both the PR body and `docs/audit/e2e/p5-execution-status.md` document the local multi-worker flow as: node apps/mobile/e2e-web/helpers/serve-exported-web.mjs & CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_LOCAL
evidence: docs/audit/e2e/p5-execution-status.md line 50 now explicitly says 'do NOT set CI=1 — it would set reuseExistingServer=false and reject the already-running server'. The command at lines 52-53 omits CI=1.

title: Mixed module system in runtime.ts: bare require() in ESM file
body_excerpt: `runtime.ts` uses ESM-style `import` at the top but calls bare `require()`. This works today because Playwright compiles TypeScript to CJS, but silently breaks under NodeNext/ESM.
evidence: apps/mobile/e2e-web/helpers/runtime.ts line 4 now uses `import { defaultApiUrl } from './e2e-defaults.js'` — a proper ESM import. No bare require() call remains. The as string cast is gone.

title: Fragile hostname match: apiBaseUrl.includes('.workers.dev') should use URL.hostname.endsWith
body_excerpt: `apiBaseUrl.includes('.workers.dev')` matches any substring of the URL. Use `new URL(apiBaseUrl).hostname.endsWith('.workers.dev')` to target the hostname specifically.
evidence: apps/mobile/playwright.config.ts line 15 still uses `apiBaseUrl.includes('.workers.dev')`. The safer `new URL(apiBaseUrl).hostname.endsWith('.workers.dev')` has not been applied.
suggested_notion_title: playwright.config.ts: fragile substring match for .workers.dev should use URL.hostname
suggested_notion_body: apps/mobile/playwright.config.ts line 15 uses `apiBaseUrl.includes('.workers.dev')` which would match .workers.dev anywhere in the URL. Use `new URL(apiBaseUrl).hostname.endsWith('.workers.dev')` for safe hostname-only matching.

title: runtime.ts bare require('./e2e-defaults.js') vs createRequire pattern (duplicate finding)
body_excerpt: runtime.ts uses bare require('./e2e-defaults.js') while serve-exported-web.mjs correctly uses createRequire(import.meta.url). This works today because Playwright compiles .ts files via its own CommonJS
evidence: apps/mobile/e2e-web/helpers/runtime.ts now uses ESM import for defaultApiUrl (line 4). No bare require() present. This is a duplicate of comment-4458695005; both are addressed.

title: e2e-web.yml missing comment: changing E2E_API_URL to custom domain silently escalates to 4 workers
body_excerpt: if a repo admin changes the E2E_API_URL GitHub variable to https://api-test.mentomate.com, CI silently escalates from 1 worker to 4 — no code change, no diff to review.
evidence: .github/workflows/e2e-web.yml lines 74/76 set PLAYWRIGHT_API_URL from vars.E2E_API_URL with no comment warning that switching from a .workers.dev URL implicitly enables 4 workers. The recommended inline comment was not added.
suggested_notion_title: e2e-web.yml: no warning that changing E2E_API_URL to custom domain enables 4 Playwright workers
suggested_notion_body: .github/workflows/e2e-web.yml lines 74/76 use E2E_API_URL without a comment. Switching from *.workers.dev to a custom domain silently escalates from 1 to 4 CI workers (controlled by playwright.config.ts usesSharedStagingApi logic). Add an inline comment documenting this behavior.

title: playwright.config.ts: fullyParallel: false on setup project has no in-code explanation
body_excerpt: The new `fullyParallel: false` on the `setup` project silently encodes an invariant (prevents concurrent auth-setup / seed-worker collisions) that lives only in `p5-execution-status.md`.
evidence: apps/mobile/playwright.config.ts lines 85-88 have `fullyParallel: false` on the setup project with no accompanying comment. The invariant (prevents concurrent auth-setup/seed collisions) lives only in external docs.
suggested_notion_title: playwright.config.ts: fullyParallel: false on setup project missing explanatory comment
suggested_notion_body: apps/mobile/playwright.config.ts line 87 sets fullyParallel: false on the setup project with no inline explanation. The invariant (prevents concurrent auth-setup/seed-worker collisions) only exists in docs/audit/e2e/p5-execution-status.md. Add a single-line comment so the invariant travels with the code.

title: New jest.mock('./ChatShell') without gc1-allow annotation — GC1 violation
body_excerpt: File: `apps/mobile/src/components/session/use-session-streaming.test.ts` Line: replacement `jest.mock('./ChatShell', ...)` Issue: New relative-path internal jest.mock without a gc1-allow annota
evidence: use-session-streaming.test.ts line 22 now has `jest.mock('./ChatShell', () => ({ // gc1-allow: hook test avoids the session barrel cycle; only the animation helper is needed`. Annotation present on the mock line.

title: Test receipt command ran only use-session-streaming.test.ts but testFiles claims 11 files verified
body_excerpt: File: `.test-receipts/mobile.json` Line: L13 Issue: The `command` in the receipt ran only `use-session-streaming.test.ts`, but `testFiles` tracks 11 changed test files. The other 10 have no green
evidence: The .test-receipts/ directory was deleted entirely in commit 8c4173a03 (chore(test): remove mobile receipt gate). The receipt gate was removed from .husky/pre-push and PR template. The partial-receipt complaint is moot.

title: Receipt timestamp predates PR changes; only 1 of 16 listed test files actually exercised
body_excerpt: File: `.test-receipts/mobile.json` Line: L13 Issue: The `command` field shows a focused --runTestsByPath run — only one file was actually tested. Yet testFiles block lists 16 changed test files.
evidence: Same as comment-4460206794: receipt mechanism deleted in commit 8c4173a03. .test-receipts/mobile.json and pre-push guard are gone. Finding is moot.

title: Receipt command field is focused rerun not full suite pnpm exec nx run mobile:test
body_excerpt: File: `.test-receipts/mobile.json` Line: `command` field Issue: Receipt records pre-commit related mobile tests; focused SessionMessageActions rerun after rebase instead of pnpm exec nx run
evidence: Receipt gate fully removed in commit 8c4173a03. .test-receipts/mobile.json deleted. Pre-push hook no longer enforces receipt format. Finding is moot.

title: Per-screen error classification extended: error.name checks in quiz/launch.tsx violate API-boundary rule
body_excerpt: File: `apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/quiz/launch.tsx` Line: added `if (apiError.name === 'ForbiddenError') return 'FORBIDDEN'` etc. Issue: Per-screen error classification is extended
evidence: apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/quiz/launch.tsx lines 79-81 still check apiError.name for ForbiddenError, ConsentRequiredError, QuotaExceededError inside screen-local errorCodeFrom function. Classification at the API client boundary has not been implemented.
suggested_notion_title: quiz/launch.tsx: per-screen error.name classification violates UX Resilience API-boundary rule
suggested_notion_body: apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/quiz/launch.tsx lines 79-81 classify errors by error.name (ForbiddenError, ConsentRequiredError, QuotaExceededError) inside a screen-local function. CLAUDE.md UX Resilience Rules require classification once at the API client boundary. Move name-based checks into middleware; screens should switch on pre-classified error type.

title: normalizeTopicTitle and prepareTopicExpansion business logic in route file (G1/G5 violation)
body_excerpt: File: `apps/api/src/routes/books.ts` Line: L55-L120 Issue: normalizeTopicTitle and prepareTopicExpansion are business logic defined directly in a route file.
evidence: books.ts imports prepareTopicExpansion from '../services/curriculum' (line 26). normalizeTopicTitle is absent from books.ts entirely. Both functions are in curriculum.ts lines 1121/1125. No local definitions remain in the route file.

title: expandExisting branch: ~55 lines of inline orchestration logic in route handler violates G1/G5
body_excerpt: File: `apps/api/src/routes/books.ts` Line: L132-L218 Issue: The expandExisting branch puts ~66 lines of business logic directly in the route handler: topic filtering, expansionContext string
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/books.ts lines 136-193 contain the expandExisting branch with inline topic count filtering (137-138), expansionContext string construction (145-152), try/catch LLM call with buildFallbackBookTopics (154-175), and persistBookTopics call. prepareTopicExpansion was moved to services but surrounding orchestration remains in-handler.
suggested_notion_title: books.ts: expandExisting branch has inline orchestration logic in route handler (G1/G5 violation)
suggested_notion_body: apps/api/src/routes/books.ts lines 136-193 contain topic count filtering, expansionContext construction, LLM call with try/catch fallback, and persistBookTopics in the route handler. CLAUDE.md: business logic belongs in services/. Extract to expandBookTopics(db, profileId, subjectId, bookId, opts) in services/curriculum.ts or services/book-expansion.ts.

title: normalizeTopicTitle defined identically in both books.ts and curriculum.ts (duplicate)
body_excerpt: File: `apps/api/src/routes/books.ts` L55 / `apps/api/src/services/curriculum.ts` L1120 Issue: normalizeTopicTitle is defined identically in both files
evidence: normalizeTopicTitle is not defined in books.ts (grep confirmed absent). It exists once in curriculum.ts line 1121. No duplicate. Resolved when the function was moved to the service layer.

title: prepareTopicExpansion (66 lines of business logic) defined in route file books.ts
body_excerpt: File: `apps/api/src/routes/books.ts` Line: L145-208 Issue: prepareTopicExpansion is 66 lines of business logic defined in a route file.
evidence: books.ts imports prepareTopicExpansion from '../services/curriculum' (line 26). No local definition in the route file. The function was moved to curriculum.ts line 1125.

title: AllNoteRow local type in notes.ts duplicates AllNote from @eduagent/schemas
body_excerpt: File: `apps/api/src/services/notes.ts` Line: L859-L871 Issue: AllNoteRow is an exported type returned by listAllNotes, making it a client-facing/API-facing type. The schema package already ex
evidence: apps/api/src/services/notes.ts lines 24-36 still define `export type AllNoteRow` with the same 12-field shape as packages/schemas/src/notes.ts AllNote (id, topicId, topicTitle, bookId, bookTitle, subjectId, subjectName, sessionId, content, createdAt, updatedAt). Not replaced with the schema import.
suggested_notion_title: notes.ts: AllNoteRow duplicates AllNote from @eduagent/schemas — shared-contract rule violation
suggested_notion_body: apps/api/src/services/notes.ts lines 24-36 define export type AllNoteRow with identical shape to AllNote in packages/schemas/src/notes.ts. Per CLAUDE.md, @eduagent/schemas is the shared contract; API-facing types must not be redefined locally. Replace with import type { AllNote } from '@eduagent/schemas' and update listAllNotes return type.
